behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names VirtualMachine.zig, configureDebugger, RuntimeTranspilerCache, and Arguments.zig which are what the tests check for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction describes the bug and required behavior without stating the exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: tests accept multiple patterns (is_disabled = or disable() call, various inspector check forms).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests only inspect git diff and parse source code with regex; they don't build bun or execute it to verify the actual cache-disable behavior at runtime.

test_not_tautological.reason: tests require both an inspector check and a cache-disable statement in proper ordering, which cannot be satisfied by a stub.

behavior_in_tests.reason: tests cover the main behavioral requirements from instruction.md (cache disabled for all inspector modes, not gated on mode).

informative_test_structure.reason: tests are separated by comment sections (fail-to-pass behavioral, anti-stub) with descriptive docstrings.

no_typos.reason: no typos observed in paths or names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: instruction names the files involved but doesn't specify exact lines; file identification is reasonable scope disclosure.
